creator: ehaupt@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

audio/rosegarden has currently no maintainer. If you like to update it to the latest release feel free to submit an update and even assume maintainership. We might then think about renaming the current port to x11rosengarden (as mentioned on the project page). If it is unmaintained we might just as well replace the current port with the old version. If you like to update this port please submit a new PR.
